code: const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||"http://localhost:4100/api";export async function apiRequest(path){let options=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};const url=`${API_BASE_URL}${path}`;const response=await fetch(url,{headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},...options});let payload={};try{payload=await response.json();}catch(error){payload={};}if(!response.ok){throw new Error(payload.error||"Request failed");}return payload;}
